series_metadata.series_description: Files created and utilized to manage the agency’s enterprise backup procedures that serve to document all electronic records stored on agency servers used as a safeguard to restore servers in the event of an emergency or system loss. Records may include the enterprise backup schedule; backup configuration; encryption keys; system information; databases; applications; and any other record produced by the agency and stored on the server during the backup action.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Maintain most updated version. outdated or superseded records when no longer of administrative value
